message:
🐛 fix: batch-fix 6 real bugs from @khushiiagrawal report (#8082)

Triaged from a 17-issue scan. The other 11 were closed as not-a-bug.

- #8070 (server_ai.go): Cap WebSocket frame size with SetReadLimit
  (1 MB) and reject prompts over 100k chars before forwarding to
  paid LLM providers. Prevents DoS / runaway cost from authenticated
  clients sending oversized payloads.

- #8057 (local_clusters.go): startKindCluster / stopKindCluster
  iterated workers 1..10 and broke on the first error, missing
  worker11+. Replaced with `docker ps -a --filter
  label=io.x-k8s.kind.cluster=<name>` so all containers belonging
  to the cluster are operated on.

- #8061 (web/src/lib/api.ts): backendAvailable was cached forever
  once true because `backendAvailable ||` short-circuited the TTL
  check. Drop the disjunct so the BACKEND_CHECK_INTERVAL gate
  always runs.

- #8064 (server_http.go): handleEventsHTTP filtered with
  strings.Contains, so a query for "my-app" matched "my-app-v2".
  Switched to exact match against the Name segment of the
  "Kind/Name" Event.Object string.

- #8065 (kagenti.go): All four kagenti list handlers (agents,
  builds, cards, tools) collapsed every error into an empty list,
  silently hiding RBAC denials and timeouts. Now only suppress
  CRD-not-installed errors and surface everything else.

- #8069 (server_operations.go): checkStatuspageHealth never drained
  the response body, potentially keeping the keepalive connection
  busy. Added io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body) before Close().

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
